workout_name: Push Day A: Chest & Triceps Focus

exercises.name: Incline Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: Focus on a slow eccentric phase.

exercises.name: Flat Dumbbell Flyes
exercises.notes: Keep a slight bend in the elbows; don't overstretch.

exercises.name: Weighted Dips
exercises.notes: Lean forward to emphasize chest over triceps.

exercises.name: Rope Overhead Tricep Extension
exercises.notes: Flare the rope at the top of the movement.

exercises.name: Single Arm Cable Pressdown
exercises.notes: Focus on the mind-muscle connection and the squeeze.
